backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for a Smart IoT Access Control system, defining types and state for users, devices, access events, smart rules, logs, and todos, with CRUD operations and role-based access control via a MixinAuthorization mixin.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that defines OldActor and NewActor state shapes and a run function that upgrades state by adding empty todos map and toDoCounter fields.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (To-Do list page, nav link, credential-gated admin dashboard, todo monitoring panel) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summary file listing short descriptions of every frontend source file, covering routing, hooks, components, pages, and contexts.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA titled 'Smart IoT Access Control Mobile Application', mounting the app at #root and loading main.tsx as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application file that sets up TanStack Router with all page routes (including /todos and /admin-dashboard), wraps the app in QueryClient/Theme/Simulation providers, and implements an AuthGate for Internet Identity authentication and profile setup.
frontend/src/components/alerts/Emergency: Polls for failed access events and displays dismissible alert cards notifying each configured emergency contact of detected intrusions, deduplicating alerts via sessionStorage.
frontend/src/components/alerts/Intrusion: Renders a dismissible banner at the top of the page when a recent failed access event is detected, showing the time and user involved.
Displays a list of up to 20 failed access events as styled cards with camera placeholder, user info, method, location, and timestamp.
frontend/src/components/analytics/Access: Renders a day-of-week by hour heatmap grid visualizing access event frequency, with intensity-based CSS classes and a legend.
frontend/src/components/analytics/Advanc: Displays advanced analytics charts including a daily access trend line chart, a per-user stacked bar chart, and peak hours data using Recharts.
frontend/src/components/architecture/Dat: Renders an animated SVG diagram showing data packets flowing between ESP32, ICP backend canister, and React frontend nodes when live mode is active.
frontend/src/components/auth/AdminLoginG: Guards child content behind a hardcoded admin email/password login form, persisting authentication state in sessionStorage for the session.
frontend/src/components/auth/AutoLogoutW: Shows a modal dialog with a countdown timer warning the user of imminent auto-logout due to inactivity, offering options to stay logged in or log out immediately.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginForm.t: Renders a centered login card with an Internet Identity button, using the `useInternetIdentity` hook to handle login state and display an authenticating indicator while logging in.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Displays a full-screen profile setup form collecting name, email, and optional RFID UID, submitting via the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` mutation with success/error toasts.
frontend/src/components/automation/AddRu: A dialog form for creating a new smart automation rule with fields for name, action, schedule, and device ID, submitted via the `useAddSmartRule` mutation.
frontend/src/components/automation/GeoFe: A card UI for simulating geo-fencing with a location toggle (near home / away), an adjustable radius slider, and an enable switch; shows a toast notification when the user arrives home while enabled.
frontend/src/components/automation/RuleE: Displays a scrollable list of smart rule execution log entries with success/failure badges and timestamps, fetched via `useGetSmartRuleExecutionLog`, with loading skeletons and an empty state.
frontend/src/components/automation/Rules: Renders a list of smart automation rules with their details and an alert-dialog-confirmed delete button that calls `useRemoveSmartRule`.
frontend/src/components/automation/Vacat: A toggle row component that enables or disables vacation/holiday mode using `useEnableVacationMode` and `useDisableVacationMode` mutations, showing a spinner while pending.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Connec: Displays an ESP32 connection status badge (Connected/Offline) by comparing the last sync timestamp to the current time with a 30-second threshold.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Contro: Renders lock, unlock, and emergency lockdown buttons for the dashboard, using mutation hooks to trigger lock/unlock actions and displaying toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Dragga: A wrapper component that makes its children draggable via HTML5 drag events, showing a grip handle icon on hover and applying visual feedback during drag.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Firmwa: Displays a per-device firmware update panel that simulates checking for new firmware versions and applying updates with a progress bar, persisting the new version via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/LockSt: Displays a large circular icon and label indicating whether the system is currently locked or unlocked, with color-coded styling for each state.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/System: Shows an aggregated system health card with a scored gauge and metrics (average temperature, memory usage, warning/critical device counts) derived from device health data.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Teleme: Renders a line chart aggregating temperature, CPU, and memory telemetry history across all devices over the last 10 data points using Recharts.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/WiFiSt: Displays the Wi-Fi signal strength as a labeled percentage with a corresponding icon and color based on strong, medium, or weak thresholds.
frontend/src/components/devices/AddDevic: A dialog form for registering a new ESP32 device by submitting a device ID and name, using a mutation hook and showing toast feedback on success or error.
frontend/src/components/devices/DeviceCa: Displays a card for an individual device showing its online status, lock state, battery, firmware version, and Wi-Fi signal, with an admin-only toggle lock button.
frontend/src/components/devices/DeviceHe: Displays a card with health metrics (uptime, temperature, memory, and signal strength) for a named device, using color-coded progress bars and a status badge based on thresholds.
frontend/src/components/events/ActivityF: Renders a scrollable list of access events sorted by timestamp, showing user email, event type, method, location, and success/failure status with icons and badges.
frontend/src/components/events/Analytics: Displays three Recharts visualizations—a pie chart for success/failure rate, a bar chart for access method frequency, and a bar chart for hourly activity patterns—derived from access event data.
frontend/src/components/events/EventFilt: Provides two dropdown selects for filtering access events by authentication method and user email, deriving unique options from the events array.
frontend/src/components/events/EventSear: A simple search input component with a search icon for filtering events by user, method, or type via a controlled text field.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Renders a site footer with a description of the ESP32-based system, copyright year, and a branded link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Sticky navigation header with logo, desktop and mobile nav links, admin-only link, notification bell with unread count, theme switcher, and user profile/logout dropdown using Internet Identity.
frontend/src/components/layout/MainLayou: Root layout component that wraps all pages with a Header, Footer, and a background pattern, rendering child routes via an Outlet.
frontend/src/components/layout/ThemeSwit: Dropdown menu component that lets users switch between six color themes (dark, light, amber, cyberpunk, midnight, ocean) using the ThemeContext.
frontend/src/components/layout/VacationM: Displays a dismissible warning banner at the top of the page when vacation mode is active, indicating that automation rules are suspended.
frontend/src/components/notifications/No: Renders a bell icon button with an unread count badge that toggles a NotificationDropdown and marks all notifications as read when opened.
Displays a dropdown panel of app notifications with category filter tabs, relative timestamps, and per-notification icons, rendered inside a scrollable list.
frontend/src/components/onboarding/Onboa: A multi-step modal walkthrough that introduces the app's main features (Dashboard, Events, Users, Automation, Settings) with progress dots and skip/next controls.
frontend/src/components/reports/ReportTa: Renders a styled table of report rows showing per-period access success/failure counts and success rate percentage with color-coded badges.
frontend/src/components/settings/Emergen: A settings panel for managing up to three emergency contacts stored in localStorage, with add and remove functionality.
frontend/src/components/settings/Simulat: A simple toggle switch component that reads and updates simulation mode state from SimulationContext.
frontend/src/components/settings/TwoFact: A settings card for enabling or disabling demo two-factor authentication via an OTP input, persisting the state to localStorage.
frontend/src/components/settings/Webhook: A settings panel component for configuring webhook forwarding URLs and alert types (intrusion, lockdown, firmware), with localStorage persistence, simulated webhook dispatch, and a delivery log display.
frontend/src/components/users/AccessWind: A modal dialog for setting per-user time-based access windows by day of week, loading existing schedules from the backend and saving updated TimeSlot arrays via mutation.
frontend/src/components/users/AddUserMod: A modal form for creating a new user with fields for name, email, RFID UID, PIN code, and role, submitting via the useAddUser mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/users/UserList.t: A table component that lists all registered users with their activity metrics, status badges, and admin actions (enable, disable, remove, set access window) fetched from the backend actor.
A React context that provides and persists a simulation mode toggle (stored in localStorage) to child components via the useSimulation hook.
frontend/src/contexts/ThemeContext.tsx: A React context that manages the active UI theme (light, dark, amber, cyberpunk, midnight, ocean), persisting the selection to localStorage and applying it as a data-theme attribute on the document root.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the Internet Identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAutoLogout.ts: A hook that tracks user activity and automatically triggers a logout callback after 5 minutes of inactivity, showing a 60-second countdown warning before doing so.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeviceHealth.ts: Custom hook that simulates and tracks device health metrics (temperature, CPU, memory, uptime) for all devices, updating every 10 seconds and maintaining a rolling history of up to 10 snapshots per device.
frontend/src/hooks/useDraggableWidgets.t: Custom hook that manages drag-and-drop reordering of dashboard widgets, persisting the order to localStorage and providing handlers for drag events.
frontend/src/hooks/useGeoFencing.ts: Custom hook that manages geo-fencing state (location, radius, enabled) with localStorage persistence and toggle/setter helpers.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useNotifications.ts: Custom hook that converts access events and log events into categorized app notifications, tracking read state in localStorage and exposing an unread count and mark-all-read function.
frontend/src/hooks/useOnboarding.ts: Simple hook that tracks whether the onboarding walkthrough has been completed using localStorage, exposing a flag and a completion callback.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend actor calls, covering user profiles, device management, access control, smart rules, and logs with appropriate cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom property themes (dark, light, amber, cyberpunk) for the application's design system.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page that fetches and displays system-wide stats, device statuses, and user data using React Query with auto-refresh. Includes StatCard and DeviceStatusCard sub-components for visualizing IoT device metrics.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardCredent: Credential-gated version of the admin dashboard wrapped in an AdminLoginGate component, also displaying todos alongside device and user stats. Reuses shared StatCard and DeviceStatusCard components with data from custom query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/Architecture.tsx: Static architecture visualization page showing the ESP32→ICP→React system topology with a toggleable live data-flow animation overlay. Includes component description cards for the ESP32 device, ICP backend, and React frontend layers.
frontend/src/pages/AutomationRules.tsx: Admin-only page for managing smart access control automation rules, rendering a list of rules, an add-rule modal, and rule execution history. Redirects non-admin users with an access denied alert.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main user dashboard displaying live IoT device status, lock controls, telemetry charts, firmware updates, and intrusion/emergency alerts. Polls device status and access events every 10 seconds via React Query.
frontend/src/pages/EventMonitoring.tsx: Event monitoring page with tabbed views for a filterable/searchable live activity feed, basic analytics charts, and advanced analytics. Fetches access events via a custom hook and supports filtering by search query, method, and user.
frontend/src/pages/Reports.tsx: Reports page that fetches access events and displays them grouped by week or month in a table with summary cards, plus CSV and PDF export functionality.
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx: Settings page that renders panels for theme switching, simulation mode toggle, webhook forwarding configuration, and emergency contacts management.
frontend/src/pages/ToDoList.tsx: To-do list page with full CRUD support, allowing users to create, toggle completion, edit, and delete tasks using backend query hooks and dialog/alert components.
frontend/src/pages/UserManagement.tsx: Admin-only user management page that displays a list of authorized users and provides a modal for adding new users, with access denied guard for non-admins.
frontend/src/types/accessEvent.ts: Defines the frontend-local AccessEvent interface used to represent mapped backend log events with fields like rfidUid, timestamp, success, and userEmail.
frontend/src/utils/analyticsUtils.ts: Utility functions for analytics: groups access events by day (last 30 days), by user (top 10), and extracts the top 3 peak hours from event timestamps.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Exports an array of ReportRow objects to a CSV file download with columns for user, period, success, failure, and success rate.
frontend/src/utils/healthMetricsUtils.ts: Utility functions for device health metrics, computing averages for temperature and memory, counting warning/critical devices, and calculating an overall health score.
frontend/src/utils/heatmapUtils.ts: Builds a 7×24 heatmap data structure from access events, mapping day-of-week and hour to event counts and normalized intensity values (0–5).
frontend/src/utils/reportUtils.ts: Provides functions to group access events into ReportRow records aggregated by user and either ISO week or calendar month, sorted in descending order.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/src/utils/userActivityUtils.ts: Computes per-user activity metrics (access count, last access time, success rate) from an array of AccessEvent objects.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based colors, typography, container queries, animation plugins, and custom font families.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state including existing features (To-Do List, Admin Dashboard), architectural notes, and pending feature requests with their requirement IDs and statuses.
